title: brainstorm/planner now dispatch on pi runtime (was claude-code)
rationale: Operator request 2026-05-22 to move the interactive Plot scouts off claude-code onto pi. Safe because the read-only (brainstorm) and .plot/.seeds-only (planner) contract is enforced in the system prompt, not by the underlying runtime — burrow_config only forwards [sandbox].network. Tradeoff: pi is a multi-provider runtime so the model identity behind these agents now depends on pi's provider config rather than implicitly Anthropic. Follow-up warren-b802 will lift this to a .warren/config.yaml knob so operators don't need to fork warren to flip it again.
